metadata.name: Dispatch Emergency Services to Traffic Accident

description: An automated incident detection system reports a multi-vehicle collision. An operator must dispatch the appropriate emergency units.

nodes.task_description: Receive an automated alert of a vehicle collision detected by roadside cameras at 'Highway 101 and Exit 4B'.

expected_outcome.value: Agent acknowledges the alert and its location.

nodes.task_description: Access the live camera feed to assess the severity of the accident and identify the number of vehicles involved.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms a three-car accident with heavy damage, requiring medical and fire response.

nodes.task_description: Dispatch the nearest available police, fire, and ambulance units to the location.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully dispatches the three required emergency service units.
